content.text: {"title":"Operator checks service health","slug":"operator-checks-service-health","intent":"An operator needs to confirm that the service is responding.","story":"The operator calls the health endpoint.","expected_behavior":"The endpoint returns a success response with health status.","boundaries":"This story does not verify downstream dependencies.","auditable_claims":["The health endpoint is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: GET /api/health"],"docs":[]}}
